content:
<USER_REQUEST>
Clean up dead code and add message search in the SMSentry app.

Working directory: D:\SMSentry

## Task 1: Remove dead InboxScreen and InboxViewModel

First, check if these files exist:
- `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\inbox\InboxScreen.kt`
- `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\inbox\InboxViewModel.kt`

Verify they are NOT referenced anywhere by searching:
```powershell
grep -r 'InboxScreen\|InboxViewModel' D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java
```

If they exist and are unreferenced, DELETE them.

## Task 2: Improve the Search Feature
File: `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\conversations\ConversationListScreen.kt`

Read the file. Check if there's a search bar already. The ViewModel already has `_searchQuery` that filters conversations by displayName, address, and lastMessage.

Check if the search UI exists in the Screen. If not, look for lines with `SearchBar` or `TextField` for search. If the search is just a filter chip or icon that does nothing, make it functional:

1. When the search icon is tapped, show a search TextField at the top
2. As the user types, filter conversations in real-time via `viewModel.onSearchQueryChanged(query)`
3. Add a close/clear button to dismiss search

If search already exists and is functional, move on.

## Task 3: Check for other dead code
Search for unused imports and files:
```powershell
Get-ChildItem -Recurse D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\inbox -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
```

Also check for any other unused screens/viewmodels that aren't in NavGraph:
```
grep -l 'composable(' D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\navigation\NavGraph.kt
```

DO NOT modify DetailScreen, SettingsScreen, ChatScreen, or any backend files.
Verify build after changes.
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-14T15:56:03+05:30.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
I'll start by checking file existence, searching for references, and reading the relevant files in parallel.

50: // ── Conversation List Screen ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
51: 
52: @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
53: @Composable
54: fun ConversationListScreen(
55:     onConversationClick: (threadId: Long, address: String) -> Unit,
56:     onComposeClick: () -> Unit,
57:     onSettingsClick: () -> Unit = {},
58:     viewModel: ConversationListViewModel = hiltViewModel()
59: ) {
60:     val conversations by viewModel.conversations.collectAsState()
61:     val isLoading by viewModel.isLoading.collectAsState()
62:     val searchQuery by viewModel.searchQuery.collectAsState()
63:     val selectedFilter by viewModel.selectedFilter.collectAsState()
64: 
65:     val scope = rememberCoroutineScope()
66:     val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
67: 
68:     var isSearchExpanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
69:     var isRefreshing by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
70:     var showOverflowMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
71: 
72:     // Reset refreshing when loading completes
73:     LaunchedEffect(isLoading) {
74:         if (!isLoading) isRefreshing = false
75:     }
76: 
77:     Scaffold(
78:         topBar = {
79:             TopAppBar(
80:                 title = {
81:                     AnimatedContent(
82:                         targetState = isSearchExpanded,
83:                         transitionSpec = {
84:                             fadeIn(tween(200)) togetherWith fadeOut(tween(200))
85:                         },
86:                         label = "topBarContent"
87:                     ) { searching ->
88:                         if (searching) {
89:                             OutlinedTextField(
90:                                 value = searchQuery,
91:                                 onValueChange = { viewModel.onSearchQueryChanged(it) },
92:                                 placeholder = {
93:                                     Text(
94:                                         "Search conversations…",
95:                                         style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge
96:                                     )
97:                                 },
98:                                 singleLine = true,
99:                                 colors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(
100:                                     focusedBorderColor = Color.Transparent,
101:                                     unfocusedBorderColor = Color.Transparent,
102:                                     cursorColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
103:                                 ),
104:                                 modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
105:                                 textStyle = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge
106:                             )
107:                         } else {
108:                             Text(
109:                                 text = "Messages",
110:                                 fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
111:                                 fontSize = 22.sp
112:                             )
113:                         }
114:                     }
115:                 },
116:                 actions = {
117:                     // Search toggle
118:                     IconButton(onClick = {
119:                         isSearchExpanded = !isSearchExpanded
120:                         if (!isSearchExpanded) viewModel.onSearchQueryChanged("")
121:                     }) {
122:                         Icon(
123:                             if (isSearchExpanded) Icons.Default.Close else Icons.Default.Search,
124:                             contentDescription = if (isSearchExpanded) "Close search" else "Search"
125:                         )
126:                     }
127: 
128:                     // Settings
129:                     IconButton(onClick = onSettingsClick) {
130:                         Icon(Icons.Default.Settings, contentDescription = "Settings")
131:                     }
132: 
133:                     // Overflow menu
134:                     Box {
135:                         IconButton(onClick = { showOverflowMenu = true }) {
136:                             Icon(Icons.Default.MoreVert, contentDescription = "More options")
137:                         }
138:                         DropdownMenu(
139:                             expanded = showOverflowMenu,
140:                             onDismissRequest = { showOverflowMenu = false }
141:                         ) {
142:                             DropdownMenuItem(
143:                                 text = { Text("Refresh") },
144:                                 onClick = {
145:                                     showOverflowMenu = false
146:                                     isRefreshing = true
147:                                     viewModel.refresh()
148:                                 }
149:                             )
150:                             DropdownMenuItem(
151:                                 text = { Text("Mark all as read") },
152:                                 onClick = { showOverflowMenu = false }
153:                             )
154:                         }
155:                     }
156:                 },
157:                 colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
158:                     containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface,
159:                     titleContentColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
160:                 )
161:             )
162:         },
163:         snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) },
164:         floatingActionButton = {
165:             FloatingActionButton(
166:                 onClick = onComposeClick,
167:                 containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
168:             ) {
169:                 Icon(
170:                     Icons.Default.Edit,
171:                     contentDescription = "Compose message",
172:                     tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary
173:                 )
174:             }
175:         }
176:     ) { padding ->
177:         Column(
178:             modifier = Modifier
179:                 .fillMaxSize()
180:                 .padding(padding)
181:         ) {
182:             // ── Filter Chips ──
183:             ConversationFilterChipRow(
184:                 selectedFilter = selectedFilter,
185:                 onFilterSelected = { viewModel.onFilterSelected(it) },
186:                 conversationCounts = Triple(
187:                     conversations.size, // doesn't matter, we show total from all
188:                     0, 0 // placeholders; chips simply label the filter
189:                 )
190:             )
191: 
192:             // ── Content Area with Pull-to-Refresh ──
193:             PullToRefreshBox(
194:                 isRefreshing = isRefreshing,
195:                 onRefresh = {
196:                     isRefreshing = true
197:                     viewModel.refresh()
198:                 },
199:                 modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()
200:             ) {
201:                 when {
202:                     isLoading && !isRefreshing -> {
203:                         // Shimmer loading skeleton
204:                         LazyColumn(
205:                             contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 0.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
206:                             verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(0.dp)
207:                         ) {
208:                             items(8) {
209:                                 ShimmerConversationItem()
210:                             }
211:                         }
212:                     }
213: 
214:                     conversations.isEmpty() && !isLoading -> {
215:                         ConversationEmptyState(
216:                             hasActiveFilter = selectedFilter != ConversationFilter.ALL
217:                                 || searchQuery.isNotEmpty()
218:                         )
219:                     }
220: 
221:                     else -> {
222:                         LazyColumn(
223:                             contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 0.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
224:                             verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(0.dp),
225:                             modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()
226:                         ) {
227:                             itemsIndexed(
228:                                 conversations,
229:                                 key = { _, convo -> convo.threadId }
230:                             ) { index, conversation ->
231:                                 val dismissState = rememberSwipeToDismissBoxState(
232:                                     confirmValueChange = { dismissValue ->
233:                                         if (dismissValue == SwipeToDismissBoxValue.EndToStart) {
234:                                             viewModel.deleteConversation(conversation.threadId)
235:                                             scope.launch {
236:                                                 val result = snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(
237:                                                     message = "Conversation deleted",
238:                                                     actionLabel = "Undo",
239:                                                     duration = SnackbarDuration.Short
240:                                                 )
241:                                                 if (result == SnackbarResult.ActionPerformed) {
242:                                                     viewModel.undoLastDelete()
243:                                                 }
244:                                             }
245:                                             true
246:                                         } else {
247:                                             false
248:                                         }
249:                                     }
250:                                 )
251: 
252:                                 // Staggered entrance animation
253:                                 var itemVisible by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
254:                                 LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
255:                                     delay(index * 30L)
256:                                     itemVisible = true
257:                                 }
258: 
259:                                 val itemAlpha by animateFloatAsState(
260:                                     targetValue = if (itemVisible) 1f else 0f,
261:                                     animationSpec = tween(250),
262:                                     label = "itemAlpha"
263:                                 )
264: 
265:                                 Box(modifier = Modifier.alpha(itemAlpha)) {
266:                                     SwipeToDismissBox(
267:                                         state = dismissState,
268:                                         backgroundContent = {
269:                                             Box(
270:                                                 modifier = Modifier
271:                                                     .fillMaxSize()
272:                                                     .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer),
273:                                                 contentAlignment = Alignment.CenterEnd
274:                                             ) {
275:                                                 Icon(
276:                                                     Icons.Default.Delete,
277:                                                     contentDescription = "Delete",
278:                                                     modifier = Modifier.padding(24.dp),
279:                                                     tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onErrorContainer
280:                                                 )
281:                                             }
282:                                         },
283:                                         enableDismissFromStartToEnd = false
284:                                     ) {
285:                                         ConversationItem(
286:                                             conversation = conversation,
287:                                             onClick = {
288:                                                 onConversationClick(conversation.threadId, conversation.address)
289:                                             }
290:                                         )
291:                                     }
292:                                 }
293: 
294:                                 // Divider between items
295:                                 if (index < conversations.lastIndex) {
296:                                     HorizontalDivider(
297:                                         modifier = Modifier.padding(start = 80.dp, end = 16.dp),
298:                                         thickness = 0.5.dp,
299:                                         color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant.copy(
300:                                             alpha = 0.5f
301:                                         )
302:                                     )
303:                                 }
304:                             }
305:                         }
306:                     }
307:                 }
308:             }
309:         }
310:     }
311: }
312: 
313: // ── Conversation Item ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
314: 
315: @Composable
316: private fun ConversationItem(
317:     conversation: Conversation,
318:     onClick: () -> Unit
319: ) {
320:     val interactionSource = remember { MutableInteractionSource() }
321:     val isPressed by interactionSource.collectIsPressedAsState()
322:     val scale by animateFloatAsState(
323:         targetValue = if (isPressed) 0.98f else 1f,
324:         animationSpec = spring(
325:             dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
326:             stiffness = Spring.StiffnessHigh
327:         ),
328:         label = "pressScale"
329:     )
330: 
331:     val isUnread = conversation.unreadCount > 0
332:     val timeString = formatTimestamp(conversation.lastTimestamp)
333: 
334:     // Avatar color from name hash
335:     val avatarColor = remember(conversation.displayName) {
336:         avatarColorForName(conversation.displayName)
337:     }
338:     val avatarLetter = conversation.displayName
339:         .firstOrNull()?.uppercase() ?: "#"
340: 
341:     Surface(
342:         modifier = Modifier
343:             .fillMaxWidth()
344:             .scale(scale)
345:             .clickable(
346:                 interactionSource = interactionSource,
347:                 indication = null,
348:                 onClick = onClick
349:             ),
350:         color = if (isUnread) {
351:             MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
352:         } else {
353:             MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
354:         }
355:     ) {
356:         Row(
357:             modifier = Modifier
358:                 .fillMaxWidth()
359:                 .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 14.dp),
360:             horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(14.dp),
361:             verticalAlignment = Alignment.Top
362:         ) {
363:             // ── Avatar ──
364:             Box(contentAlignment = Alignment.Center) {
365:                 Box(
366:                     modifier = Modifier
367:                         .size(52.dp)
368:                         .clip(CircleShape)
369:                         .background(avatarColor.copy(alpha = 0.15f)),
370:                     contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
371:                 ) {
372:                     Text(
373:                         text = avatarLetter,
374:                         color = avatarColor,
375:                         fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
376:                         fontSize = 20.sp
377:                     )
378:                 }
379: 
380:                 // Risk indicator dot
381:                 if (conversation.isFlagged) {
382:                     Box(
383:                         modifier = Modifier
384:                             .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
385:                             .size(14.dp)
386:                             .clip(CircleShape)
387:                             .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)
388:                             .padding(2.dp)
389:                             .clip(CircleShape)
390:                             .background(ScamRed)
391:                     )
392:                 }
393:             }
394: 
395:             // ── Content ──
396:             Column(
397:                 modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
398:                 verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(3.dp)
399:             ) {
400:                 // Top row: name + timestamp
401:                 Row(
402:                     modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
403:                     horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
404:                     verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
405:                 ) {
406:                     Text(
407:                         text = conversation.displayName,
408:                         fontWeight = if (isUnread) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Medium,
409:                         style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
410:                         maxLines = 1,
411:                         overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
412:                         modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
413:                         color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
414:                     )
415:                     Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
416:                     Text(
417:                         text = timeString,
418:                         style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
419:                         color = if (isUnread) {
420:                             MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
421:                         } else {
422:                             MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
423:                         },
424:                         fontWeight = if (isUnread) FontWeight.SemiBold else FontWeight.Normal
425:                     )
426:                 }
427: 
428:                 // Bottom row: last message preview + unread badge
429:                 Row(
430:                     modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
431:                     horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
432:                     verticalAlignment = Alignment.Top
433:                 ) {
434:                     Text(
435:                         text = conversation.lastMessage,
436:                         style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
437:                         maxLines = 2,
438:                         overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
439:                         color = if (isUnread) {
440:                             MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
441:                         } else {
442:                             MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
443:                         },
444:                         fontWeight = if (isUnread) FontWeight.Medium else FontWeight.Normal,
445:                         modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
446:                     )
447: 
448:                     if (isUnread) {
449:                         Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
450:                         UnreadCountBadge(count = conversation.unreadCount)
451:                     }
452:                 }
453:             }
454:         }
455:     }
456: }
457: 
458: // ── Unread Count Badge ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
459: 
460: @Composable
461: private fun UnreadCountBadge(count: Int) {
462:     val displayText = if (count > 99) "99+" else count.toString()
463:     Box(
464:         modifier = Modifier
465:             .defaultMinSize(minWidth = 22.dp, minHeight = 22.dp)
466:             .clip(CircleShape)
467:             .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary),
468:         contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
469:     ) {
470:         Text(
471:             text = displayText,
472:             color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
473:             fontSize = 11.sp,
474:             fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
475:             modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 5.dp, vertical = 2.dp)
476:         )
477:     }
478: }
479: 
480: // ── Filter Chip Row ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
481: 
482: @Composable
483: private fun ConversationFilterChipRow(
484:     selectedFilter: ConversationFilter,
485:     onFilterSelected: (ConversationFilter) -> Unit,
486:     conversationCounts: Triple<Int, Int, Int>,
487:     modifier: Modifier = Modifier
488: ) {
489:     LazyRow(
490:         modifier = modifier
491:             .fillMaxWidth()
492:             .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 6.dp),
493:         horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
494:     ) {
495:         items(ConversationFilter.entries) { filter ->
496:             val filterColor = when (filter) {
497:                 ConversationFilter.ALL -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
498:                 ConversationFilter.UNREAD -> BrandIndigo
499:                 ConversationFilter.FLAGGED -> ScamRed
500:             }
501: 
502:             FilterChip(
503:                 selected = selectedFilter == filter,
504:                 onClick = { onFilterSelected(filter) },
505:                 label = {
506:                     Text(
507:                         text = filter.label,
508:                         fontWeight = if (selectedFilter == filter) FontWeight.SemiBold
509:                         else FontWeight.Normal
510:                     )
511:                 },
512:                 colors = FilterChipDefaults.filterChipColors(
513:                     selectedContainerColor = filterColor,
514:                     selectedLabelColor = Color.White
515:                 )
516:             )
517:         }
518:     }
519: }
520: 
521: // ── Shimmer Loading Skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
522: 
523: @Composable
524: private fun ShimmerConversationItem() {
525:     val shimmerColors = listOf(
526:         MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
527:         MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.2f),
528:         MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f)
529:     )
530: 
531:     val transition = rememberInfiniteTransition(label = "shimmer")
532:     val translateAnim by transition.animateFloat(
533:         initialValue = 0f,
534:         targetValue = 1000f,
535:         animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
536:             animation = tween(1200, easing = FastOutSlowInEasing),
537:             repeatMode = RepeatMode.Restart
538:         ),
539:         label = "shimmerTranslate"
540:     )
541: 
542:     val brush = Brush.linearGradient(
543:         colors = shimmerColors,
544:         start = Offset(translateAnim - 200f, translateAnim - 200f),
545:         end = Offset(translateAnim, translateAnim)
546:     )
547: 
548:     Row(
549:         modifier = Modifier
550:             .fillMaxWidth()
551:             .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 14.dp),
552:         horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(14.dp),
553:         verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
554:     ) {
555:         // Avatar placeholder
556:         Box(
557:             modifier = Modifier
558:                 .size(52.dp)
559:                 .clip(CircleShape)
560:                 .background(brush)
561:         )
562: 
563:         Column(
564:             modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
565:             verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)
566:         ) {
567:             // Name row
568:             Row(
569:                 modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
570:                 horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
571:             ) {
572:                 Box(
573:                     modifier = Modifier
574:                         .fillMaxWidth(0.5f)
575:                         .height(14.dp)
576:                         .clip(RoundedCornerShape(4.dp))
577:                         .background(brush)
578:                 )
579:                 Box(
580:                     modifier = Modifier
581:                         .width(40.dp)
582:                         .height(12.dp)
583:                         .clip(RoundedCornerShape(4.dp))
584:                         .background(brush)
585:                 )
586:             }
587:             // Message preview
588:             Box(
589:                 modifier = Modifier
590:                     .fillMaxWidth(0.85f)
591:                     .height(12.dp)
592:                     .clip(RoundedCornerShape(4.dp))
593:                     .background(brush)
594:             )
595:             Box(
596:                 modifier = Modifier
597:                     .fillMaxWidth(0.6f)
598:                     .height(12.dp)
599:                     .clip(RoundedCornerShape(4.dp))
600:                     .background(brush)
601:             )
602:         }
603:     }
604: }
605: 
606: // ── Empty State ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
607: 
608: @Composable
609: private fun ConversationEmptyState(hasActiveFilter: Boolean) {
610:     Box(
611:         modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
612:         contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
613:     ) {
614:         Column(
615:             horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
616:             verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp),
617:             modifier = Modifier.padding(40.dp)
618:         ) {
619:             Text(
620:                 text = if (hasActiveFilter) "No results" else "No messages",
621:                 style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium,
622:                 color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
623:                 fontWeight = FontWeight.Light
624:             )
625:             Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
626:             Text(
627:                 text = if (hasActiveFilter) "No conversations found"
628:                 else "No messages yet",
629:                 style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
630:                 color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.7f),
631:                 fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
632:             )
633:             Text(
634:                 text = if (hasActiveFilter)
635:                     "Try adjusting your search or filter."
636:                 else
637:                     "Start a conversation by tapping the compose button below.",
638:                 style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
639:                 color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.5f),
640:                 textAlign = TextAlign.Center
641:             )
642:         }
643:     }
644: }

646: // ── Utility Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
647: 
648: private fun formatTimestamp(timestamp: Long): String {
649:     val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
650:     val diff = now - timestamp
651:     val calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
652:     val msgCalendar = Calendar.getInstance().apply { timeInMillis = timestamp }
653: 
654:     return when {
655:         // Today — show time
656:         calendar.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) == msgCalendar.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) &&
657:             calendar.get(Calendar.YEAR) == msgCalendar.get(Calendar.YEAR) -> {
658:             SimpleDateFormat("h:mm a", Locale.getDefault()).format(Date(timestamp))
659:         }
660:         // Yesterday
661:         diff < 2 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000L &&
662:             calendar.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) - msgCalendar.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) == 1 -> {
663:             "Yesterday"
664:         }
665:         // This week — show day name
666:         diff < 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000L -> {
667:             SimpleDateFormat("EEEE", Locale.getDefault()).format(Date(timestamp))
668:         }
669:         // This year — show month and day
670:         calendar.get(Calendar.YEAR) == msgCalendar.get(Calendar.YEAR) -> {
671:             SimpleDateFormat("MMM d", Locale.getDefault()).format(Date(timestamp))
672:         }
673:         // Older — show full date
674:         else -> {
675:             SimpleDateFormat("MM/dd/yy", Locale.getDefault()).format(Date(timestamp))
676:         }
677:     }
678: }
679: 
680: /**
681:  * Generate a deterministic avatar color from a display name.
682:  */
683: private fun avatarColorForName(name: String): Color {
684:     val colors = listOf(
685:         Color(0xFF6750A4), // Purple
686:         Color(0xFF7C4DFF), // Deep purple
687:         Color(0xFF536DFE), // Indigo
688:         Color(0xFF2196F3), // Blue
689:         Color(0xFF00897B), // Teal
690:         Color(0xFF2E7D32), // Green
691:         Color(0xFFEF6C00), // Orange
692:         Color(0xFFD32F2F), // Red
693:         Color(0xFFC2185B), // Pink
694:         Color(0xFF5E35B1), // Deep purple variant
695:     )
696:     val index = name.hashCode().absoluteValue % colors.size
697:     return colors[index]
698: }
